title: Udta Punjab
subTitle: A rock star, doctor, cop, and labourer battle the chaos of Punjab's drug crisis, each fighting demons as addiction and crime threaten to consume everything.

title: Table No. 21
subTitle: While on a fully-paid trip to Fiji, the financially struggling Vivaan and Siya are offered a chance to participate in a game show offering a huge cash prize. As the game progresses, the tasks and questions become increasingly challenging.

title: Trapped
subTitle: Trapped

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Sapne Suhane Ladakpan Ke
subTitle: In fulfilment of her mother's dying wish, Gunjan, a spirited teenager, is sent to live with her aunt. As she gradually adjusts to her new life, she finds solace in her shy cousin, Rachna.

title: Ek Mahanayak: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar
subTitle: Preyed upon due to socio-economic discrimination, Bhimrao Ramji Ambedkar, a young boy from a poor family, strives for basic human rights and equality for all.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Bhor Bhakti Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of melodious songs sung and composed by talented artists is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Santoshi Maa
subTitle: As Santoshi starts working in the house, Raghu warns her discreetly. Poulomi Devi's initial attempt to provoke Santoshi fails, prompting her to disguise herself and confront Santoshi in a different form.

title: Shoorveer Sister
subTitle: A princess has seven brothers who are stuck in the form of flowers, as she strives to remove the curse and give their lives back to them.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Doli Armaanon Ki
subTitle: Urmi's silent refusal wounds Samrat's ego, prompting him to hunt for the truth.

title: Pavitra Rishta
subTitle: Manav, a humble mechanic, is deeply in love with Archana, a hardworking middle-class girl. They marry, but their happiness is soon overshadowed by a series of crises within their family.

title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
subTitle: When her disabled daughter is kidnapped, Vidya attempts to save her but a car knocks her off. When the police gets involved in the case, Vidya's mysterious past is revealed.

title: Vanvaas
subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
subTitle: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Kedarnath
